session.user:
Run the following commands and report results: 1. `ruff check src/erk/cli/cli.py src/erk/cli/help_formatter.py src/erk/cli/commands/info/release_notes_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/info/__init__.py` 2. `ruff format --check src/erk/cli/cli.py src/erk/cli/help_formatter.py src/erk/cli/commands/info/release_notes_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/info/__init__.py` 3. `ty check src/erk/cli/cli.py src/erk/cli/help_formatter.py src/erk/cli/commands/info/release_notes_cmd.py`
Report the full output of each command.
session.assistant: I'll run these commands and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/cli.py src/erk/cli/help_formatter.py src/erk/cli/commands/info/release_notes_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/info/__init__.py
Run ruff linter check on specified files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff format --check src/erk/cli/cli.py src/erk/cli/help_formatter.py src/erk/cli/commands/info/release_notes_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/info/__init__.py
Run ruff format check on specified files

tool_use.name: Bash

Run type checker on specified files

session.assistant:
## Results Summary
All checks passed successfully:
